name: Blintz Souffle
recipeInstructions:
Combine cheeses, egg yolks, 1 tbsp sugar, and vanilla in a small bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth. Set aside.
In the container of an electric blender, combine 6 eggs, sour cream, orange juice, and butter. Blend until smooth. Add flour, 1/3 cup sugar, baking powder, and orange rind; blend until smooth. Pour half of batter into a greased 13" x 9" x 2-inch (2") baking dish. Spoon cream cheese mixture evenly over batter, and spread carefully with a knife. Pour remaining batter over the cream cheese mixture. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until puffy and golden. Serve immediately.
Blueberry sauce: Combine sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a heavy saucepan. Gradually stir in water. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil. Boil 1 minute; stir in blueberries and lemon juice. Serve warm.
